name: Thread Ownership
description: Empêche plusieurs agents de répondre dans le même thread Slack.

forwarderUrl.label: Forwarder URL
forwarderUrl.help: Base URL of the slack-forwarder ownership API (default: http://slack-forwarder:8750)

abTestChannels.label: A/B Test Channels
abTestChannels.help: Slack channel IDs where thread ownership is enforced
